expectations.evidence: Created 2 files (01-password-reset-backend.md, 02-password-reset-frontend.md). Within 1-2 range, split by backend/frontend concern.

Every item includes specific file paths: prisma/schema.prisma, src/lib/mailer.ts, src/lib/password-reset-token.ts, src/app/api/auth/forgot-password/route.ts, src/components/auth/ForgotPasswordForm.tsx, etc.
Both files have H1 title, context paragraph explaining purpose, and checklist with '- [ ]' items.
Highly specific: includes field names (token, email, expiresAt), function signatures (createResetToken, validateResetToken), bcryptjs with saltRounds=12, test cases for token utility.
